subject: iPhone Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting or forgets saved network
description: User reports iPhone drops Wi-Fi every few minutes or saved corporate network disappears from the list after locking the screen.

ts_steps.title: Forget and rejoin
ts_steps.action: Settings → Wi-Fi → tap info icon on the network → Forget This Network; rejoin and re-enter credentials.

ts_steps.title: Reset network settings
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Transfer or Reset iPhone → Reset → Reset Network Settings (warns: removes all saved Wi-Fi passwords).

ts_steps.title: Disable Wi-Fi Assist and VPN
ts_steps.action: Settings → Cellular → scroll to bottom → turn off Wi-Fi Assist; disable or disconnect any active VPN profile and retest.

internal_information: Common after iOS upgrades that change Wi-Fi stack behavior. Router band-steering (2.4 vs 5 GHz) and lease times can also cause drops. Check if issue is network-wide or device-specific.
